predictions.node_text_used: Component name: SYSTEM. Category: system. Ports: cm gateway, gateway device.

top_k_candidates.ra_text: RA component: Gateway. Definition: Handles communication between devices and higher-level layers when direct connectivity is not possible. It bridges heterogeneous protocols, communication technologies, and payload formats.. Tag: raelements. Incoming connectors: IoTIM–Gateway Communication. Outgoing connectors: Gateway–Device Communication.

predictions.node_text_used: Component name: tempController. Category: device. Classifier: .. .. github DHsystem Communications.aadl#Communications.tempController.

top_k_candidates.ra_text: RA component: Device. Definition: Serves as the entry point from the physical world into the digital one. It connects to sensors and or actuators via wired or wireless interfaces and enables interaction with the environment.. Tag: raelements. Incoming connectors: Gateway–Device Communication, Device–IoTIM Communication. Outgoing connectors: Device–Sensor Communication, Device–Actuator Communication.
